subcodes.first_line: Blessed art thou, for through the voice of thy Pen thou hast caused Me to hear the lamentation of thy heart and the cry of thy innermost being in thy love for God, our Beloved [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لله درک بما اسمعنی لسان قلمک حنین قلبک و ضجیج فوادک فی حب الله محبوبنا و
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for protection, @prophecy and fulfillment, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @suffering and imprisonment, @personal instructions
